name: xproof
description: No API key needed. Any agent can anchor a proof and pay per call via x402 — one HTTP request, no account. Prove Before Act: anchor reasoning (WHY) on-chain before executing (WHAT). 4W immutable audit trail on MultiversX. MCP native.
author: jasonxkensei

tools.name: register_free_trial
tools.description: Get a free pm_ API key. 10 free proofs, no wallet, no credit card. Use on first run before certify_file.

tools.name: certify_file
tools.description: Anchor a SHA-256 hash on MultiversX. Use BEFORE executing any significant action (Prove Before Act). Pass metadata.why to record agent reasoning.

tools.name: audit_agent_session
tools.description: Log a complete agent session (input, reasoning, output) as a certified audit record. Blocks execution if proof fails.

tools.name: verify_proof
tools.description: Verify an existing proof by UUID. No auth required.

tools.name: investigate_proof
tools.description: Reconstruct the full 4W audit trail (WHO/WHAT/WHEN/WHY) for a disputed agent action. No auth required.
